blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure text or important areas.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present that affect document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles are present that cause text distortion.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No parts of the receipt/invoice are missing or incomplete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements are blocking or obscuring document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer recipient, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice receipt number, item description line items, and payment method. It is a telecommunications expense as it details a mobile service subscription.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains more than 5 required fields, including supplier (Orange), consumer recipient (Mr. Pascal Caisse), transaction amount (56,10 €), transaction date (27 mai 2025), invoice receipt number (12461430525), item description line items (Go Intense), and payment method (domiciliation). This confirms it as an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Le montant dû sera débité de votre compte le 06/06/2025 avec la communication structurée +++111/4840/98806+++
extraction.terms_conditions: Consultez nos Conditions Générales sur www.orange.be

issues.description: The receipt does not include the purchaser details as required by the compliance standards.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoices must include the purchaser details

issues.description: The receipt does not provide a detailed itemized description of each purchase/expenditure as required by the compliance standards.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoices must include itemized description of each purchase/expenditure

issues.description: The receipt does not include the required business purpose documentation and manager approval as required by the compliance standards.
issues.recommendation: Please provide the business purpose documentation and obtain manager approval before submission.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses. Employee's line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is non-compliant due to missing mandatory fields (purchaser details, itemized description) and lack of required additional documentation (business purpose, manager approval). These issues need to be addressed to meet compliance standards.
